PAGE_TITLE: August deal: choose your gift | Hotel Asteria
META_DESC: Book a stay in August before 7 August at Hotel Asteria in Venray and choose your own gift: wellness access per person, a bottle of bubbly in your room, free breakfast or free bike rental.
HERO_TITLE:
Choose your gift
for your stay in August
REVIEWS_FALLBACK_JS: [{author:'Danielle',time:'14-08-2025',rating:5,text:'Two wonderful days with dinner, breakfast and a late check-out. Drinks on the terrace, a neat and clean room, friendly staff. DINER_SUB: Wellness access per person, bubbly in your room, free breakfast or a day of cycling through Noord-Limburg: you choose, we make sure it is ready for you.

BEL1_TEXT: Sweeping dunes, quiet forests and hundreds of kilometres of cycling and walking paths, right behind the hotel.
BEL2_TEXT: One of the most beautiful gardens in the Netherlands. Ideal for an afternoon full of colour, calm and culture.
BEL3_TEXT: Noord-Limburg has some of the most beautiful cycling routes in the Netherlands, through hills and along the Maas. Choosing free bike rental as your gift? Then your route starts right at our front door.
BEL4_TEXT: A tour of Limburg's most famous brewery, with a tasting and a look behind the scenes of the brewing process.
FACR_TEXT: Dishes prepared with passion in a cosy, homely atmosphere, from breakfast to dinner.
FACW_TEXT: 300 m² of wellness with saunas, plunge pool and relaxation rooms, high above Venray.
FACG_TEXT: A modern gym for all hotel guests, whenever it suits you.
FAQ_Q1: How does the August deal work?
FAQ_A1: Book a night before 7 August for a stay in August and choose your gift above. The matching gift code is automatically included in your booking, and your gift will be ready for you on arrival.
FAQ_Q2: Which dates does the deal apply to?
FAQ_A2: The deal applies to stays throughout the month of August 2026. Bookings are possible up to and including 6 August.
FAQ_Q3: Who does the wellness access apply to?
FAQ_A3: Access to our wellness on the Top Floor applies per person. Reserve your time slot in advance at reception or via wellnessasteria.nl.
FAQ_Q4: Can I cancel free of charge?
FAQ_A4: Yes, you can cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before arrival.
FAQ_Q5: What are the check-in and check-out times?
FAQ_A5: Check-in is possible from 15:00, check-out until 11:00. Arriving earlier or leaving later is possible on request, subject to availability.
CARE_BODY: Do you have a question about the August deal or your stay, or would you rather book by phone? Our reception team is here for you every day and happy to help you think it through. Feel free to get in touch, we are glad to assist you personally.
